        <script>
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [S T A R T]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            let initialCount = 0;
            let iFramesLoaded = false;
            let chatLoaded = false;
            // Count how many of the three consents are true
            function countConsents() {
                let c = Osano.cm;
                let count = 0;
                if (c.analytics) count++;
                if (c.marketing) count++;
                if (c.personalization) count++;
                return count;
            }

            //Wait for document to render or chat/iframes fire too early on implied consent
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                // Run once Osano finishes initializing
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function() {
                    initialCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                });

                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-consent-saved', function() {
                    const newCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                    // If any consent is removed, refresh page
                    if (newCount < initialCount) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {initialCount = newCount;}
                });

                const showCookiePreferences = document.getElementsByClassName('show-cookie-preferences');
                const link = document.getElementById('osano_drawer');
                if (!link) return;
                // Ensure CMP is ready
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function () {
                    link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (Osano.cm.drawerOpen) {
                            Osano.cm.hideDrawer();
                        } else {
                            // Most installs: no args; some docs show a token—fallback if needed.
                            try { Osano.cm.showDrawer(); }
                            catch { Osano.cm.showDrawer('osano-cm-dom-info-dialog-open'); }
                        }
                    });
                });
                // Hook to drawer
                for (i=0;i<showCookiePreferences.length;i++) {
                    showCookiePreferences.item(i).addEventListener('click', function () {
                        Osano.cm.showDrawer();
                    });
                }
            });
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [E N D]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            function loadNiceChat() {
                            }
            function loadIframeEmbeds() {
                if (!iFramesLoaded) {
                    const embeddedIframes = document.querySelectorAll('.acadia_iframe_inner, .acadia_video_inner');
                    for (i=0;i<embeddedIframes.length;i++) {
                        const embeddedIframe = embeddedIframes.item(i);
                        embeddedIframe.innerHTML = '';
                        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                        iframe.setAttribute('src', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-src'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('class', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-class'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('data-cookie-consent', 'yes');
                        iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
                        iframe.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
                        embeddedIframe.appendChild(iframe);
                    }
                    iFramesLoaded = true;
                }
            }
        </script>

sp"><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_1 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_1"><span class="i"></span>Individualized Care</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_1" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0">Timberline Knolls provides individualized care for adult women and adolescent girls who have been struggling with substance use disorders, mental health concerns, and co-occurring eating disorders. Each woman or girl who receives care with us completes a thorough assessment to identify her unique strengths, needs, and goals. This information informs the development of her individualized plan. Our commitment to individualized care means </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0">that no </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0">two women or girls will have identical experiences at Timberline Knolls</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW24507646 BCX0">. </span></span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_2 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_2"><span class="i"></span>Compassionate Professionals</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_2" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW68946727 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW68946727 BCX0">Care at Timberline Knolls is provided by a multidisciplinary team of experienced professionals. These compassionate experts work closely with each woman </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW68946727 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW68946727 BCX0">or</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW68946727 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW68946727 BCX0"> girl to develop and deliver the focused services that will help them achieve true and lasting healing in mind, body, and spirit. When you receive care at Timberline Knolls, you will be encouraged to work in active collaboration with your treatment team, and you will be empowered to take ownership of your continued recovery.</span></span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_3 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_3"><span class="i"></span>Safe & Supportive Environment</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_3" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0">At Timberline Knolls, we are committed to maintaining a safe, supportive, and welcoming environment for </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0">every</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0"> woman </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0">or</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW65872469 BCX0"> girl who is entrusted to our care. class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_4 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_4"><span class="i"></span>What is residential treatment?</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_4" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0">When you take part in residential care at Timberline Knolls, you can step away from the stresses and distractions of daily life so </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0">that </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0">you can focus your full attention on your health. </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0">During residential treatment, you’ll live in a comfortable room on our serene</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0">,</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0"> 43-acre campus. </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW199114714 BCX0">Our residential programming features round-the-clock care and individualized services, all provided by compassionate professionals in a safe and welcoming environment.</span></span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_5 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_5"><span class="i"></span>How much can I expect insurance to contribute toward my care?</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_5" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">We work with all major insurance companies, and we welcome opportunities to partner with new organizations. </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">Coverage for our services may vary from insurer to insurer. </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">The best way to determine </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">insurance coverage for </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">your </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">care at Timberline Knolls is to </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW152202328 BCX0">contact us. A member of our team will be happy to work directly with your insurance company to ensure that you have access to all benefits within your plan.</span></span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_6 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_6"><span class="i"></span>What distinguishes Timberline Knolls from other women-only rehabs or residential treatment centers?</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_6" class="content"><p><span data-contrast="auto">Timberline Knolls provides</span><span data-contrast="auto"> individualized car</span><span data-contrast="auto">e</span><span data-contrast="auto">, age-appropriate programming, </span><span data-contrast="auto">and holistic services to promote lasting healing in mind, body, and spirit, all within a safe and welcoming environment that was designed specifically for women and girls. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":160,"335559740":259}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Throughout your time at Timberline Knolls, you’ll work with dedicated professionals and form mutually beneficial bonds with others who are receiving care. When you complete your time with us, you’ll receive a detailed discharge plan to guide your continued progress, and you’ll join o</span><span data-contrast="auto">u</span><span data-contrast="auto">r national alumnae network, which can be a source of ongoing support</span><span data-contrast="auto"> for years to come</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_7 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_7"><span class="i"></span>Where can I learn more about addiction?</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_7" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">Increasing your knowledge</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0"> about </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">substance use and </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">addiction </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">is</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0"> an important part of </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">the</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0"> recovery </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">process</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">. This website can be a source of considerable information about the impact of addiction and the </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">services</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0"> that can help women and girls</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">. For </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">answers to </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">specific questions about care for substance use disorders, please contact us directly at your convenience. A member of our team is available 24/7 to </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW55434257 BCX0">speak with you.</span></span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_8 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_8"><span class="i"></span>What will a woman or girl experience while receiving care at Timberline Knolls?</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_8" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0">Every</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0"> woman </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0">or</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0"> girl who receives services at Timberline Knolls will have a unique experience</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0"> that is based on her specific needs and goals.</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0"> However, everyone who is entrusted to our care can expect to benefit from certain fundamental features and principles. For example, you</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0">r</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0"> care will include several types of therapy, you will work in active collaboration with a team of experienced professionals, and you will receive comprehensive support within a safe and welcoming environment. To learn more, click the “Programs” </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0">tab</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW204219640 BCX0"> at the top of this page.</span></span></p>
</div></div><div class="acadia_accordion_section acadia_accordion_section_9 section box cf"><h2 class="toggle " data-toggle="acadia_accordion_content_9"><span class="i"></span>How does Timberline Knolls help women and girls who wish to see the principles of their Christian faith reflected in their care?</h2><div id="acadia_accordion_content_9" class="content"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0">We are proud to offer faith-based care through</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0"> The Grace Program. </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0">Features of this</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0"> optional program include</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0"> multiple Christian-focused groups, Christ-centered 12-Step recovery services, </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0">sessions with a Christian therapist, </span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0" lang="EN-US" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW131281040 BCX0">a dedicated sacred space on our campus for prayer and reflection, and opportunities to attend worship services within the community.</span></span></p>
</div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_column vc_column_30 hide-on-xs hide-on-sm hide-on-md vc_col-lg-4 vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 sp"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="acadia_codeblock acadia_codeblock_2 sp"><div class="home-leaf"></div>

pages.rawText:
Mood Disorder, Drug Addiction, Co-Occurring Eating Disorders, Alcohol Treatment Center | Residential Rehab & Recovery | Timberline Knolls 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 Skip to Content 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 Successful Treatment Results 

 Testimonials 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

To request medical records: CALL (615) 861-6000 x 5 or

 Email Your Request 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 Making A Real Life Difference 

 

 

 
 Residential & Outpatient Treatment Center for Women & Girls 

 FOR WOMEN & ADOLESCENT GIRLS WHO ARE STRUGGLING WITH ADDICTION, DEPRESSION, TRAUMA, & CO-OCCURRING EATING DISORDERS 

 
 
 
 

 Residential Program 
 

 
 
 
 

 Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) 
 

 
 
 
 

 Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) 
 

 

 Learn More About Timberline Knolls 

 INDIVIDUALIZED & AGE-APPROPRIATE SERVICES WITHIN A SAFE & INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT 

 

To view this embedded video, please edit your cookie preferences and allow Personalization cookies.

 Cookie Preferences 

 Individualized Care

 Timberline Knolls provides individualized care for adult women and adolescent girls who have been struggling with substance use disorders, mental health concerns, and co-occurring eating disorders. Each woman or girl who receives care with us completes a thorough assessment to identify her unique strengths, needs, and goals. This information informs the development of her individualized plan. Our commitment to individualized care means that no  two women or girls will have identical experiences at Timberline Knolls .  

 Compassionate Professionals

 Care at Timberline Knolls is provided by a multidisciplinary team of experienced professionals. These compassionate experts work closely with each woman  or  girl to develop and deliver the focused services that will help them achieve true and lasting healing in mind, body, and spirit. When you receive care at Timberline Knolls, you will be encouraged to work in active collaboration with your treatment team, and you will be empowered to take ownership of your continued recovery. 

 Safe & Supportive Environment

 At Timberline Knolls, we are committed to maintaining a safe, supportive, and welcoming environment for  every  woman  or  girl who is entrusted to our care. Our  private  campus   is located on  43 wooded acres, with features that include carefully landscaped grounds and historical buildings.  Our team works diligently to ensure that  Timberline Knolls   remains  a safe space where  all  women and girls  are treated with the dignity and  respect  they deserve.   

 

 
 
 
 

 Active Alumnae Program 
 

 
 
 
 

 Hear from Our Alumnae 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 Meet Our Staff 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 Join Our Team 
 

 

 Worried or uncertain? Timberline Knolls can help. 
 

We know this may be a difficult time for you and your family. There are many questions involved in understanding treatment for addiction and the mental health disorders we treat.

 
 Answers to Common Questions from Women, Girls, & Their Families 
 

 What is residential treatment?

 When you take part in residential care at Timberline Knolls, you can step away from the stresses and distractions of daily life so  that  you can focus your full attention on your health.  During residential treatment, you’ll live in a comfortable room on our serene ,  43-acre campus.  Our residential programming features round-the-clock care and individualized services, all provided by compassionate professionals in a safe and welcoming environment. 

 How much can I expect insurance to contribute toward my care?

 We work with all major insurance companies, and we welcome opportunities to partner with new organizations.  Coverage for our services may vary from insurer to insurer.  The best way to determine  insurance coverage for  your  care at Timberline Knolls is to  contact us. A member of our team will be happy to work directly with your insurance company to ensure that you have access to all benefits within your plan. 

 What distinguishes Timberline Knolls from other women-only rehabs or residential treatment centers?

 Timberline Knolls provides  individualized car e , age-appropriate programming,  and holistic services to promote lasting healing in mind, body, and spirit, all within a safe and welcoming environment that was designed specifically for women and girls.    

 Throughout your time at Timberline Knolls, you’ll work with dedicated professionals and form mutually beneficial bonds with others who are receiving care. When you complete your time with us, you’ll receive a detailed discharge plan to guide your continued progress, and you’ll join o u r national alumnae network, which can be a source of ongoing support  for years to come . 

 Where can I learn more about addiction?

 Increasing your knowledge  about  substance use and  addiction  is  an important part of  the  recovery  process . This website can be a source of considerable information about the impact of addiction and the  services  that can help women and girls . For  answers to  specific questions about care for substance use disorders, please contact us directly at your convenience. A member of our team is available 24/7 to  speak with you. 

 What will a woman or girl experience while receiving care at Timberline Knolls?

 Every  woman  or  girl who receives services at Timberline Knolls will have a unique experience  that is based on her specific needs and goals.  However, everyone who is entrusted to our care can expect to benefit from certain fundamental features and principles. For example, you r  care will include several types of therapy, you will work in active collaboration with a team of experienced professionals, and you will receive comprehensive support within a safe and welcoming environment. To learn more, click the “Programs”  tab  at the top of this page. 

 How does Timberline Knolls help women and girls who wish to see the principles of their Christian faith reflected in their care?

 We are proud to offer faith-based care through  The Grace Program.  Features of this  optional program include  multiple Christian-focused groups, Christ-centered 12-Step recovery services,  sessions with a Christian therapist,  a dedicated sacred space on our campus for prayer and reflection, and opportunities to attend worship services within the community. 

 

 

 Rediscover Your Strength 

 Through Individualized, Holistic Treatment in a Tranquil, Healing Setting 

 

 

 

 

 

 “ Going to Timberline Knolls was one of the best decisions I have ever made! I highly recommend you go here for treatment! You will come out knowing how to cope better with life! ” 

– Tiffany L.

 
 

 

Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center is respected nationwide for its treatment of eating disorders, mental health, and addiction concerns.

 

 

 © 2026 Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center / 40 Timberline Drive, Lemont, IL 60439 / (630) 749-2493 

 

If you are unable to read or view this page please call Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center at (630) 749-2493 .

 

 

 
 Accessibility Notice 

 Privacy Practices 

 Online Privacy Policy 

 Compliance & Code of Conduct 

 Cookie Preferences 
 

 

 
 

 
 Call 24/7 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Cookie Preferences 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 Top 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Timberline Knolls is Closed

Timberline Knolls is honored to have served the community for nearly 20 years. We have now closed our campuses and are no longer accepting new patients. For additional resources, please visit  https://www.samhsa.gov/ .

        <script>
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [S T A R T]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            let initialCount = 0;
            let iFramesLoaded = false;
            let chatLoaded = false;
            // Count how many of the three consents are true
            function countConsents() {
                let c = Osano.cm;
                let count = 0;
                if (c.analytics) count++;
                if (c.marketing) count++;
                if (c.personalization) count++;
                return count;
            }

            //Wait for document to render or chat/iframes fire too early on implied consent
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                // Run once Osano finishes initializing
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function() {
                    initialCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                });

                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-consent-saved', function() {
                    const newCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                    // If any consent is removed, refresh page
                    if (newCount < initialCount) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {initialCount = newCount;}
                });

                const showCookiePreferences = document.getElementsByClassName('show-cookie-preferences');
                const link = document.getElementById('osano_drawer');
                if (!link) return;
                // Ensure CMP is ready
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function () {
                    link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (Osano.cm.drawerOpen) {
                            Osano.cm.hideDrawer();
                        } else {
                            // Most installs: no args; some docs show a token—fallback if needed.
                            try { Osano.cm.showDrawer(); }
                            catch { Osano.cm.showDrawer('osano-cm-dom-info-dialog-open'); }
                        }
                    });
                });
                // Hook to drawer
                for (i=0;i<showCookiePreferences.length;i++) {
                    showCookiePreferences.item(i).addEventListener('click', function () {
                        Osano.cm.showDrawer();
                    });
                }
            });
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [E N D]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            function loadNiceChat() {
                            }
            function loadIframeEmbeds() {
                if (!iFramesLoaded) {
                    const embeddedIframes = document.querySelectorAll('.acadia_iframe_inner, .acadia_video_inner');
                    for (i=0;i<embeddedIframes.length;i++) {
                        const embeddedIframe = embeddedIframes.item(i);
                        embeddedIframe.innerHTML = '';
                        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                        iframe.setAttribute('src', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-src'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('class', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-class'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('data-cookie-consent', 'yes');
                        iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
                        iframe.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
                        embeddedIframe.appendChild(iframe);
                    }
                    iFramesLoaded = true;
                }
            }
        </script>

class="acadia_headline acadia_headline_1 hero-h1 sp"><span class="headline"><span class="text">Admissions and What to Expect</span></span></h1></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix sp"></div></div></div></div><div id="main" class="sp30"><div class="container clearfix vc_row"><div id="content" class="vc_column vc_col-xs-12 vc_col-md-8 sp30"><div id="article"><article id="post-718" class="article acadia_page_cats-admissions"><div class="entry-content"><div class="wpb-content-wrapper"><div class="vc_row vc_row_15 vc_row-fluid sp"><div class="vc_column vc_column_16 vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 sp"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="acadia_text acadia_text_1 sp"><p><span data-contrast="auto">Our admissions process is</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">designed to connect you with the care you need as efficiently and effectively as possible. Each step of the way, you’ll be guided by a compassionate professional who will serve as a source of information, answers, and support.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2><span data-contrast="none">Our Admissions Criteria</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Timberline Knolls Treatment Center <a href="/programs/">programming</a> serves adolescent girls and adult women who </span><span data-contrast="auto">are struggling with </span><span data-contrast="auto"><a href="/eating-disorder/">eating disorders</a>, substance use disorders, </span><span data-contrast="auto">trauma, mood disorders</span><span data-contrast="auto">,</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">and </span><span data-contrast="auto">other</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">mental health concerns. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Ensuring that our facility is the perfect place for you is an important part of our admissions process. For this reason, </span><span data-contrast="auto">all admissions decisions are</span><span data-contrast="auto"> based on a thorough assessment of your unique needs and goals. In general, our </span><span data-contrast="auto">residential </span><span data-contrast="auto">programming may be ideal for you if you meet the following criteria:</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Female </span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Age 12 or older</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">S</span><span data-contrast="auto">truggling with an</span><span data-contrast="auto"> eating disorder, </span><span data-contrast="auto">a </span><span data-contrast="auto">substance use disorder, </span><span data-contrast="auto">trauma, </span><span data-contrast="auto">or </span><span data-contrast="auto">a </span><span data-contrast="auto">mental health disorder</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Can benefit from round-the-clock care to achieve stabilization</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you are an </span><span data-contrast="auto">adult</span><span data-contrast="auto"> age 18 </span><span data-contrast="auto">or older</span><span data-contrast="auto"> who do</span><span data-contrast="auto">es</span><span data-contrast="auto"> not need </span><span data-contrast="auto">residential</span><span data-contrast="auto"> care, we also offer a partial hospitalization program (PHP)</span><span data-contrast="auto"> with</span><span data-contrast="auto"> on-campus</span><span data-contrast="auto"> housing</span><span data-contrast="auto"> options</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> Women can directly admit to our PHP. </span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Please note that the information in this section</span><span data-contrast="auto"> is provided for general reference purposes only. The best way to determine if Timberline Knolls is the right place for you is to contact us </span><span data-contrast="auto">directly.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Throughout your entire experience with Timberline Knolls, our sole goal is to connect you with the services that will best prepare you to make sustained progress toward improve</span><span data-contrast="auto">d</span><span data-contrast="auto"> health.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2><span data-contrast="none">A Streamlined Process</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">When you need treatment, the last thing you want to do is spend your time filling out paperwork and attempting to navigate regulations, policies, and procedures. At Timberline Knolls, we understand this completely</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">W</span><span data-contrast="auto">e’ve worked diligently to develop a process </span><span data-contrast="auto">to</span><span data-contrast="auto"> gather all the information we need with minimal delay so </span><span data-contrast="auto">that </span><span data-contrast="auto">you can </span><span data-contrast="auto">begin your healing journey</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The first step in our admissions process is a simple conversation. You can reach a member of our team 24/7 by phone, email, or live</span><span data-contrast="auto"> online</span><span data-contrast="auto"> chat. You can start the discussion whenever it’s convenient for you, in whichever format you prefer. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">To help determine </span><span data-contrast="auto">if</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">Timberline Knolls</span><span data-contrast="auto"> is right for you, the professional with whom you speak will ask you some simple questions on topics such as:</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">The nature and severity of the symptoms you’ve been experiencing</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">How these symptoms have been impacting your day-to-day functioning</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Your treatment history, including if you’ve previously received a diagnosis from a qualified healthcare provider</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="0" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Your goals and expectations for </span><span data-contrast="auto">the time you spend </span><span data-contrast="auto">at Timberline Knolls</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">During this discussion, you’ll also have the opportunity to ask questions and get detailed answers about </span><span data-contrast="auto">any</span><span data-contrast="auto"> aspect of </span><span data-contrast="auto">the care we provide.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">If at any point we determine that you may be better served by another facility, we will be happy to make an appropriate referral to a trusted provider.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Starting with the very first conversation you have with a member of our team, we want to leave no doubt that we’re committed to providing you with the information </span><span data-contrast="auto">you need so</span><span data-contrast="auto"> that</span><span data-contrast="auto"> you are empowered to advocate for yourself and make the decisions that </span><span data-contrast="auto">are</span><span data-contrast="auto"> right</span><span data-contrast="auto"> for you.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2><span data-contrast="none">The Next Steps</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">After confirming that </span><span data-contrast="auto">Timberline Knolls can provide the type and level of care that’s ideal for you</span><span data-contrast="auto">, </span><span data-contrast="auto">the next steps will focus on </span><span data-contrast="auto">documenting</span><span data-contrast="auto"> some additional information and scheduling a date for you to </span><span data-contrast="auto">come to our campus</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you have previously been in treatment, or if you</span><span data-contrast="auto"> ha</span><span data-contrast="auto">ve been referred to Timberline Knolls by a professional who is currently providing you with clinical services, we will request your authorization to get your records. The more information our team has, the better prepared we’ll be to develop and deliver the focused, personalized care you need.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you will be using insurance to pay for </span><span data-contrast="auto">your time at Timberline Knolls</span><span data-contrast="auto">, one of our advisors can, with your permission, work directly with your insurance provider. We’ll confirm your coverage, verify your benefits, and make sure that your insurance provider has the details they need to process your claim and fund your care. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2><span data-contrast="none">Starting Your Timberline Knolls Experience </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Depending on various individual factors, the steps that lead to your arrival on <a href="https://timberlineknolls.com/about/location/">our campus</a> can typically be completed with a few conversations. We appreciate the importance of getting accurate and complete information, and we will never rush this process. At the same time, we’re committed to accomplishing this in an efficient manner.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Once all necessary details have been documented and verified, all that’s left is </span><span data-contrast="auto">to schedule your start date and prepare for your arrival.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">When you first get </span><span data-contrast="auto">to our facility for residential treatment</span><span data-contrast="auto">, you’ll have a brief session with one of our clinicians, you’ll sign some paperwork, and you’ll complete a medical assessment with a member of our nursing staff. A member of our team will review our policies and procedures with you, give you a tour of our facility, and </span><span data-contrast="auto">answer any questions you have about what you can expect during your time with us.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> Timberline Knolls will also inform you of our full continuum of care available – from residential to PHP (partial hospitalization program) and IOP (Intensive Outpatient Program), with supportive housing in nearby Orland Park, IL. Our outpatient services are available as a step-down or direct admission.</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">To learn more, or to start the admissions process, please contact us at </span><span data-contrast="auto">y</span><span data-contrast="auto">our convenience.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><strong>Click below to download the Release of Information Form:</strong></p>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/sites/185/2022/11/TK-ROI.pdf">Release of Information Form</a></p>
<p>To reach the medical records department, please dial extension 2438 when prompted from the menu.</p>
<p><i><span data-contrast="auto">This content was written on behalf of and reviewed by the clin</span></i><i><span data-contrast="auto">ical staff at Timberline Knolls</span></i><i><span data-contrast="auto">.</span></i><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>

Admissions Information & What To Expect | Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 Skip to Content 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 Successful Treatment Results 

 Testimonials 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

To request medical records: CALL (615) 861-6000 x 5 or

 Email Your Request 

 
 
 
 

 
 Admissions and What to Expect 

 Our admissions process is   designed to connect you with the care you need as efficiently and effectively as possible. Each step of the way, you’ll be guided by a compassionate professional who will serve as a source of information, answers, and support.   

 Our Admissions Criteria   

 Timberline Knolls Treatment Center programming serves adolescent girls and adult women who are struggling with  eating disorders , substance use disorders,  trauma, mood disorders ,   and  other   mental health concerns.    

 Ensuring that our facility is the perfect place for you is an important part of our admissions process. For this reason,  all admissions decisions are  based on a thorough assessment of your unique needs and goals. In general, our  residential  programming may be ideal for you if you meet the following criteria:   

 

 Female    

 Age 12 or older   

 S truggling with an  eating disorder,  a  substance use disorder,  trauma,  or  a  mental health disorder   

 Can benefit from round-the-clock care to achieve stabilization   

 

 If you are an  adult  age 18  or older  who do es  not need  residential  care, we also offer a partial hospitalization program (PHP)  with  on-campus  housing  options .  Women can directly admit to our PHP.      

 Please note that the information in this section  is provided for general reference purposes only. The best way to determine if Timberline Knolls is the right place for you is to contact us  directly.   

 Throughout your entire experience with Timberline Knolls, our sole goal is to connect you with the services that will best prepare you to make sustained progress toward improve d  health.   

 A Streamlined Process   

 When you need treatment, the last thing you want to do is spend your time filling out paperwork and attempting to navigate regulations, policies, and procedures. At Timberline Knolls, we understand this completely .     

 W e’ve worked diligently to develop a process  to  gather all the information we need with minimal delay so  that  you can  begin your healing journey .   

 The first step in our admissions process is a simple conversation. You can reach a member of our team 24/7 by phone, email, or live  online  chat. You can start the discussion whenever it’s convenient for you, in whichever format you prefer.    

 To help determine  if   Timberline Knolls  is right for you, the professional with whom you speak will ask you some simple questions on topics such as:   

 

 The nature and severity of the symptoms you’ve been experiencing   

 How these symptoms have been impacting your day-to-day functioning   

 Your treatment history, including if you’ve previously received a diagnosis from a qualified healthcare provider   

 Your goals and expectations for  the time you spend  at Timberline Knolls   

 

 During this discussion, you’ll also have the opportunity to ask questions and get detailed answers about  any  aspect of  the care we provide.   If at any point we determine that you may be better served by another facility, we will be happy to make an appropriate referral to a trusted provider.   

 Starting with the very first conversation you have with a member of our team, we want to leave no doubt that we’re committed to providing you with the information  you need so  that  you are empowered to advocate for yourself and make the decisions that  are  right  for you.   

 The Next Steps   

 After confirming that  Timberline Knolls can provide the type and level of care that’s ideal for you ,  the next steps will focus on  documenting  some additional information and scheduling a date for you to  come to our campus .   

 If you have previously been in treatment, or if you  ha ve been referred to Timberline Knolls by a professional who is currently providing you with clinical services, we will request your authorization to get your records. The more information our team has, the better prepared we’ll be to develop and deliver the focused, personalized care you need.   

 If you will be using insurance to pay for  your time at Timberline Knolls , one of our advisors can, with your permission, work directly with your insurance provider. We’ll confirm your coverage, verify your benefits, and make sure that your insurance provider has the details they need to process your claim and fund your care.    

 Starting Your Timberline Knolls Experience    

 Depending on various individual factors, the steps that lead to your arrival on our campus can typically be completed with a few conversations. We appreciate the importance of getting accurate and complete information, and we will never rush this process. At the same time, we’re committed to accomplishing this in an efficient manner.   

 Once all necessary details have been documented and verified, all that’s left is  to schedule your start date and prepare for your arrival.   

 When you first get  to our facility for residential treatment , you’ll have a brief session with one of our clinicians, you’ll sign some paperwork, and you’ll complete a medical assessment with a member of our nursing staff. A member of our team will review our policies and procedures with you, give you a tour of our facility, and  answer any questions you have about what you can expect during your time with us. Timberline Knolls will also inform you of our full continuum of care available – from residential to PHP (partial hospitalization program) and IOP (Intensive Outpatient Program), with supportive housing in nearby Orland Park, IL. Our outpatient services are available as a step-down or direct admission. 

 To learn more, or to start the admissions process, please contact us at  y our convenience.   

 Click below to download the Release of Information Form: 

 Release of Information Form 

To reach the medical records department, please dial extension 2438 when prompted from the menu.

 This content was written on behalf of and reviewed by the clin ical staff at Timberline Knolls .   

 Our Admissions Process 

 About Timberline Knolls 

 

 
 We help each woman and adolescent girl rediscover and harness her strengths in five core aspects of the self: 

 
 
 

 

 

 “ Timberline Knolls saved my life. The therapists are truly incredible and they really care about us. I made friends for life and I got my life back on track. ” 

– A former resident

 

 
 Why Choose Timberline Knolls? 

 

To view this embedded video, please edit your cookie preferences and allow Personalization cookies.

 Cookie Preferences 

 Individualized Care from Exemplary Medical and Clinical Staff 

 Experiential & Spiritual Reinvigoration and Healing for the Whole Family 

 Lifelong Friendships with a Positive Peer Group 

 Secure, Tranquil Setting in a Convenient, Central Location 

 Award Winning On-Campus School 

 
 

 

Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center is respected nationwide for its treatment of eating disorders, mental health, and addiction concerns.

 

 

 © 2026 Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center / 40 Timberline Drive, Lemont, IL 60439 / (630) 749-2493 

 

If you are unable to read or view this page please call Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center at (630) 749-2493 .

 

 

 
 Accessibility Notice 

 Privacy Practices 

 Online Privacy Policy 

 Compliance & Code of Conduct 

 Cookie Preferences 
 

 

 
 

 
 Call 24/7 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Cookie Preferences 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 Top 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Timberline Knolls is Closed

Timberline Knolls is honored to have served the community for nearly 20 years. We have now closed our campuses and are no longer accepting new patients. For additional resources, please visit  https://www.samhsa.gov/ .

        <script>
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [S T A R T]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            let initialCount = 0;
            let iFramesLoaded = false;
            let chatLoaded = false;
            // Count how many of the three consents are true
            function countConsents() {
                let c = Osano.cm;
                let count = 0;
                if (c.analytics) count++;
                if (c.marketing) count++;
                if (c.personalization) count++;
                return count;
            }

            //Wait for document to render or chat/iframes fire too early on implied consent
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                // Run once Osano finishes initializing
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function() {
                    initialCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                });

                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-consent-saved', function() {
                    const newCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                    // If any consent is removed, refresh page
                    if (newCount < initialCount) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {initialCount = newCount;}
                });

                const showCookiePreferences = document.getElementsByClassName('show-cookie-preferences');
                const link = document.getElementById('osano_drawer');
                if (!link) return;
                // Ensure CMP is ready
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function () {
                    link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (Osano.cm.drawerOpen) {
                            Osano.cm.hideDrawer();
                        } else {
                            // Most installs: no args; some docs show a token—fallback if needed.
                            try { Osano.cm.showDrawer(); }
                            catch { Osano.cm.showDrawer('osano-cm-dom-info-dialog-open'); }
                        }
                    });
                });
                // Hook to drawer
                for (i=0;i<showCookiePreferences.length;i++) {
                    showCookiePreferences.item(i).addEventListener('click', function () {
                        Osano.cm.showDrawer();
                    });
                }
            });
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [E N D]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            function loadNiceChat() {
                            }
            function loadIframeEmbeds() {
                if (!iFramesLoaded) {
                    const embeddedIframes = document.querySelectorAll('.acadia_iframe_inner, .acadia_video_inner');
                    for (i=0;i<embeddedIframes.length;i++) {
                        const embeddedIframe = embeddedIframes.item(i);
                        embeddedIframe.innerHTML = '';
                        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                        iframe.setAttribute('src', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-src'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('class', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-class'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('data-cookie-consent', 'yes');
                        iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
                        iframe.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
                        embeddedIframe.appendChild(iframe);
                    }
                    iFramesLoaded = true;
                }
            }
        </script>

id="top"><div class="container "><div class="templatera_shortcode   sp" data-template="top-standard-page"><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row vc_row_1 hero vc_row-fluid sp"><div class="vc_column vc_column_2 vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 sp"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><style class="sp">.acadia_headline_1 {color: #ffffff;font-size: 30px;}@media screen and (min-width: 560px) {.acadia_headline_1 {font-size: 36px;}}@media screen and (min-width: 768px) {.acadia_headline_1 {font-size: 48px;}}</style><h1 class="acadia_headline acadia_headline_1 hero-h1 sp"><span class="headline"><span class="text">Intensive Outpatient Program for Women and Girls</span></span></h1></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix sp"></div></div></div></div><div id="main" class="sp30"><div class="container clearfix vc_row"><div id="content" class="vc_column vc_col-xs-12 vc_col-md-8 sp30"><div id="article"><article id="post-4930" class="article acadia_page_cats-program"><div class="entry-content"><div class="wpb-content-wrapper"><div class="vc_row vc_row_15 vc_row-fluid sp"><div class="vc_column vc_column_16 vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 sp"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="acadia_text acadia_text_1 sp"><p><span data-contrast="auto">Each woman or girl who struggles with an eating disorder and other behavioral health concerns heals differently. After completing a higher level of care, many women can benefit from stepping down to a structured but less intense program for additional healing</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span></p>
<p>That’s what Timberline Knolls’ intensive outpatient program (IOP) delivers. We provide care multiple days per week that gives women age 18 and older the chance to continue their recovery journey while beginning to more completely reintegrate into their day-to-day routine. We also provide a separate, age-specific adolescent IOP for girls ages 12-17.</p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Benefits of Intensive Outpatient Programming</span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">An intensive outpatient program is an opportunity for you to continue receiving professional care for an eating disorder, a mental health concern, the effects of trauma, or a substance use disorder after completing a higher level of programming. At Timberline Knolls, women who complete our partial hospitalization program (PHP) can step down to our IOP as they continue to address the concerns that have affected their lives. Girls ages 12-17 may enter our adolescent IOP directly, or they may step down to the program after completing a higher level of care, such as inpatient or residential programming.</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">There are many benefits to the support you’ll receive </span><span data-contrast="auto">by</span><span data-contrast="auto"> choosing</span><span data-contrast="auto"> the</span><span data-contrast="auto"> IOP at Timberline Knolls, including:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility: The IOP provides a higher level of support than you would receive in traditional outpatient therapy, but it offers more freedom to work, attend school, or participate in other activities than a PHP does</span><span data-contrast="auto">. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Camaraderie: Much like with our <a href="/programs/php/">PHP</a>, you’ll participate in group therapy sessions that will allow you to build bonds with women who have struggled with eating disorders and other behavioral health concerns. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Skill-building practice: With the additional freedom of flexibility that comes with our IOP, you’ll have the opportunity to apply the skills you’ve learned to situations in your everyday life.</span></li>
</ul>
<p>For adults, admission to the IOP at Timberline Knolls currently requires the prior completion of our partial hospitalization program. All admissions are based on internal referrals from your primary therapist.</p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">The Adult IOP Experience</span><span data-ccp-props="{"335559738":40}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">As is the case with any program at Timberline Knolls, our IOP takes into account each woman’s unique needs, life experience, medical history, and genetic background. </span><span data-contrast="auto">That allows us to individual</span><span data-contrast="auto">ize</span><span data-contrast="auto"> your care plan so that you get the most out of your time with us. </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you have already completed PHP at our facility, our staff of expert clinicians </span><span data-contrast="auto">will be able to</span><span data-contrast="auto"> adjust your previous plan to reflect the progress you made at that higher level of care.</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Programming in our intensive outpatient program takes place three to five days a week, depending on your specific needs. Typical length of stay is flexible, but most women take part in our IOP for five to six weeks.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Elements of your care with us may include:</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Daily group therapy</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Weekly i</span><span data-contrast="auto">ndividual and experiential therapies</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Family therapy on an as-needed basis</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Group sessions make up the foundation of our programming. You’ll participate in groups for three hours each treatment day, covering topics such as skill</span><span data-contrast="auto">–</span><span data-contrast="auto">building, motivation, relapse prevention, psychoeducation, boundaries, and meaningful life. Experie</span><span data-contrast="auto">ntial sessions may include art</span><span data-contrast="auto">, exposure outings, and skills practice.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">The Adolescent IOP Experience</span><span data-ccp-props="{"335559738":40}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The adolescent intensive outpatient program is available for girls ages 12-17. The program meets Monday-Thursday from 3:30-6:30 p.m., giving girls the opportunity to receive the comprehensive care they need while still being able to attend school. Every client receives an individualized care plan that outlines what they can expect during their time in the program. Each girl’s plan is carefully crafted to meet their unique needs. </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p>The adolescent IOP is appropriate for girls who do not need the round-the-clock care offered in residential treatment but can still benefit from participating in a structured program. In our IOP, we provide specialized services for girls who are suffering from eating disorders and other mental health concerns, including:</p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Anorexia</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Bulimia</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Binge-eating disorder</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Depression</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Anxiety</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Bipolar disorder</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Social anxiety disorder</li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1">Posttraumatic stress disorder</li>
</ul>
<p>Group therapy is the main treatment method we use in our adolescent IOP. Clients take part in group therapy sessions three hours a day. These sessions are led by licensed social workers and licensed clinical professional counselors and include process groups, psychoeducation groups, and experiential groups. While in group therapy, clients have a chance to meet with other girls who are struggling with similar challenges, which allows them to give and receive support that can be crucial to their healing process. A number of different topics may be discussed in group therapy, including:</p>
<ul>
<li>Family dynamics</li>
<li>Self-image</li>
<li>Nutrition</li>
<li>Mental health</li>
<li>Eating disorder relapse prevention</li>
</ul>
<p>Clients also participate in expressive arts therapy and music therapy once a week.</p>
<p>Recognizing the importance of family support, we also offer an hourlong education group for parents every Wednesday evening.</p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">The Evening IOP Experience</span><span data-ccp-props="{"335559738":40}"> </span></h2>
<p>Our evening intensive outpatient program (IOP) is a great treatment option for women who are struggling with mood and trauma-related disorders and need more structure and support than outpatient therapy alone can provide. The flexibility of this program also gives women the ability to receive treatment at a time that doesn’t interfere with their work or school schedules.</p>
<p>Our evening IOP is in-person and available on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays from 5:30PM-8:30PM.</p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Continuing Care</span><span data-ccp-props="{"335559738":40}"> </span></h2>
<p>Continuing care is a priority at Timberline Knolls. After all, that mantra is what led you to our intensive outpatient program.</p>
<p>Seeking support for an eating disorder, an addiction, a mood disorder, or the effects of trauma takes a tremendous amount of courage. Our goal at Timberline Knolls is to put you in a position to succeed in the days, weeks, and months to come after you leave our care.</p>
<p>That’s why we start creating a unique discharge plan for you as soon as you begin taking part in our IOP. By beginning this valuable resource right away, we can provide you with the support you need to continue your progress, and we’ll update that document to reflect the progress you make during your time in our IOP.</p>
<p>Your continuing care plan will include our recommendations for potential follow-up care, access to community resources, options for applicable support groups, and details about the Timberline Knolls alumnae network to keep you connected well into the future.</p>
<p>Better days are within your reach. By choosing Timberline Knolls, you’ll be able to enjoy those days in a whole new light.</p>
<p><i><span data-contrast="auto">This content was written on behalf of and reviewed by the clinical staff at Timberline Knolls</span></i><i><span data-contrast="auto">.</span></i></p>

<style>#modal-fade,#modal-alerts{display:none;left:0;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:1000}#modal-fade{position:fixed;background:rgba(0,0,0,.9)}#modal-alerts{position:fixed;top:0;padding:50px 0;overflow-y:auto}#modal-alerts .container{max-width:800px;padding:0}#modal-alerts .container>.close{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;overflow:hidden}#modal-alerts .alert{position:relative;background:#fff;color:#333;padding:30px;max-width:800px;margin:0 auto}#modal-alerts .alert + .alert{margin-top:20px}</style><script>
						window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
							// when overlay is clicked, hide alert and fade but no cookie is set
							jQuery("#modal-alerts .container > .close").on("click", function(e) {
								e.preventDefault();
								jQuery("#modal-fade, #modal-alerts, #modal-alerts .alert").hide();
								// yesScroll(); // reference breaks with minification of theme.js
							});
							// when button or close is clicked, possibly hide alert and fade, and set a cookie to keep hiding the alert during the requested interval
							jQuery("#modal-alerts .button, #modal-alerts .alert .close").on("click", function(e) {
								console.log("here");
								e.preventDefault();
								var alertElement = jQuery(this).closest(".alert");
								setAlertCookie(alertElement.attr("id"), alertElement.data("interval"));
								if (jQuery(this).attr("href") != "" && typeof jQuery(this).attr("href") != "undefined") {
									if (jQuery(this).attr("target") == "_blank") {
										window.open(jQuery(this).attr("href"), "_blank");
									} else {
										window.location.href = jQuery(this).attr("href");
									}
								} else {
									alertElement.hide();
									if (jQuery("#modal-alerts .alert:visible").length == 0) {jQuery("#modal-fade, #modal-alerts").hide();}
									// yesScroll(); // reference breaks with minification of theme.js
								}
